flashcards.back:
a - literal character
ε - empty string (length 0)
∅ - empty set (no strings)
RS - concatenation
R|S - union (or)
R* - Kleene star (0 or more)

1. Parentheses ()
2. Star *
3. Concatenation (implicit)
4. Union |

Example: ab*|c = (a(b*))|c

R+ = RR* (one or more)
R? = R|ε (zero or one)
R{n} = RR...R (n times)
[abc] = a|b|c (char class)

Rε = R (identity)
R∅ = ∅ (annihilator)
R|R = R (idempotent)
(R*)* = R* (star idempotent)
R(S|T) = RS|RT (distributive)

Starts with a: a(a|b)*
Ends with b: (a|b)*b
Contains ab: (a|b)*ab(a|b)*
Even length: ((a|b)(a|b))*
All strings: (a|b)* = Σ*
